creator: ol@dbconn.net
text:
Hello Allan,
hello Freddy,

sysctl net.link.bridge.pfil_member=0

did it. Nice workaround. Thanks.


ifconfig igb0 -lro

did it too. And seems to get the root of the problem. I was very surprised that this solves also the throughput inside the VM. Because I could reproduce it inside a VM I thought it was hardware independent.

Any idea how to proceed with this bug?

Thanks a lot
Ole
